productDisplayName: Playboy Men Malibu Perfume Buy 1 Get 1 free
description: Style Noteplayboy launches a new fragrance, named Malibu, thus enlarging the collection of  fragrances which includes Miami, New york, Vegas, Hollywood and the Ibiza edition. Playboy Malibu shows an ultra cool man with aromatic and seductive notes of the ocean. Energy of the composition vibrates in the air from the very beginning with a lively composition of lemon, apple, mint, green leaves, lemon verbena and neroli..and what's more to double the joy, you buy one  perfume and get one absolutely free! Quantity: 50 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
